{{Quote|Anakin and Asajj continue their hand-to-hand duel on Yavin 4. Ventress, an expert fighter who battles using two lightsabers at the same time, proves to be a formidable foe for the young Jedi.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/18.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Eighteen (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 18'''" is the eighteenth episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, the eighth episode in [[Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]], and the eighteenth episode in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[April 6]], [[2004]].

==Plot summary==
[[File:AvAYavin.jpg|thumb|left|The continuing duel.]]

[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] continue their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] duel throughout the jungles of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to hurl entire trees at each other. Skywalker manages to disarm Ventress, but she leaps into the tree canopy, her lightsabers following shortly after. The duel takes them high into the trees, branches, and vines of Yavin. Eventually, they exit the foliage and Skywalker follows Ventress to the roof of a [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] [[temple]]. Ventress hurls stones and masonry at him, then [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-pushes]] Skywalker across the ground. His clothes torn and tattered, Skywalker stands and faces his enemy. As it starts to rain heavily, the two combatants stand motionless, lightsabers at the ready.
